name: Parallax42 Reference Intelligence Memory Manifest
reviewScope: Submission-facing advisory reference memory for legal intelligence, compliance controls, Responsible AI, security, procurement, sanctions/export, and HSE/ESG prompts.
reviewMethod: Official-source spot check plus local reference corpus regeneration. This is not live regulatory crawling and is not legal advice.

primaryAnchors.name: NIST AI Risk Management Framework
primaryAnchors.notes: AI RMF 1.0, Generative AI Profile, and 2026 Critical Infrastructure Profile concept note are advisory anchors for AI risk, human oversight, transparency, monitoring, and governance questions.

primaryAnchors.name: NIST AI RMF Generative AI Profile
primaryAnchors.notes: Advisory anchor for generative-AI misuse, measurement, provenance, incident response, content risk, and governance controls.

primaryAnchors.name: Regulation (EU) 2024/1689 Artificial Intelligence Act
primaryAnchors.notes: Official EUR-Lex text used as an issue-spotting anchor for high-risk AI, prohibited practices, transparency, human oversight, and documentation questions when EU context is relevant.

primaryAnchors.name: OECD AI Principles
primaryAnchors.notes: International AI principles anchor for human-centred values, transparency, robustness, accountability, and responsible stewardship questions.

primaryAnchors.name: UAE National Strategy for Artificial Intelligence 2031
primaryAnchors.notes: UAE-specific AI strategy anchor for national AI governance, sector priorities, capability development, and public-sector AI context.

primaryAnchors.name: Dubai AI Ethics Principles and Guidelines
primaryAnchors.notes: UAE/Dubai advisory anchor for responsible AI principles, fairness, accountability, transparency, and explainability prompts.

primaryAnchors.name: ISO/IEC 42001:2023
primaryAnchors.notes: AI management system anchor; ISO copyrighted content is not copied into the repo.

primaryAnchors.name: ISO/IEC 23894:2023
primaryAnchors.notes: AI risk management anchor; ISO copyrighted content is not copied into the repo.

primaryAnchors.name: NIST Cybersecurity Framework 2.0
primaryAnchors.notes: Advisory anchor for govern, identify, protect, detect, respond, and recover evidence questions.

primaryAnchors.name: NIST SP 800-53 Rev. 5
primaryAnchors.notes: Security and privacy control-family anchor for access, audit, incident response, configuration, and risk assessment questions.

primaryAnchors.name: NIST SP 800-171 Rev. 3
primaryAnchors.notes: Sensitive information and supplier handling anchor.

primaryAnchors.name: NIST SP 800-218 Secure Software Development Framework
primaryAnchors.notes: Secure software development, supply-chain, release, and vulnerability-management evidence anchor.

primaryAnchors.name: CISA Cross-Sector Cybersecurity Performance Goals
primaryAnchors.notes: Advisory anchor for baseline cybersecurity outcome questions and supplier control prompts.

primaryAnchors.name: OWASP Application Security Verification Standard
primaryAnchors.notes: Application security verification anchor for access, authentication, session, API, logging, and configuration questions.

primaryAnchors.name: OWASP Top 10
primaryAnchors.notes: Application security risk anchor for web/API supplier assurance prompts.

primaryAnchors.name: ISO/IEC 27001:2022
primaryAnchors.notes: Information security management anchor; ISO copyrighted content is not copied into the repo.

primaryAnchors.name: UAE Cyber Security Council
primaryAnchors.notes: UAE-specific cybersecurity anchor for national cyber governance and security-control context.

primaryAnchors.name: NIST Privacy Framework
primaryAnchors.notes: Privacy Framework 1.0 and 1.1 initial public draft references are advisory anchors for privacy-risk questions.

primaryAnchors.name: GDPR Regulation (EU) 2016/679
primaryAnchors.notes: Official EU privacy legal text anchor; used only for issue spotting and evidence questions, not legal advice.

primaryAnchors.name: European Data Protection Board Guidelines
primaryAnchors.notes: EU supervisory guidance anchor for transfer, controller/processor, data-subject-rights, and accountability questions.

primaryAnchors.name: UK ICO AI and Data Protection Guidance
primaryAnchors.notes: Advisory anchor for AI/privacy risks, explainability, fairness, security, accuracy, and governance prompts.

primaryAnchors.name: Singapore Personal Data Protection Act
primaryAnchors.notes: Singapore privacy anchor for PDPA obligations, consent, purpose limitation, protection, retention, and transfer prompts.

primaryAnchors.name: UAE Data Protection Laws
primaryAnchors.notes: UAE-specific official portal anchor for UAE personal data protection and related privacy-law issue spotting.

primaryAnchors.name: DIFC Data Protection Law No. 5 of 2020
primaryAnchors.notes: UAE/DIFC-specific privacy anchor for financial free-zone data-protection prompts.

primaryAnchors.name: ADGM Office of Data Protection
primaryAnchors.notes: UAE/ADGM-specific privacy anchor for ADGM data-protection prompts.

primaryAnchors.name: Trade.gov Consolidated Screening List
primaryAnchors.notes: US Government consolidated screening list anchor for restricted-party and export/end-user escalation questions.

primaryAnchors.name: OFAC Sanctions List Service
primaryAnchors.notes: OFAC list/data anchor for sanctions screening escalation. The app does not make a sanctions determination.

primaryAnchors.name: Export Administration Regulations
primaryAnchors.notes: eCFR EAR anchor for export-control issue spotting. The app does not make license determinations.

primaryAnchors.name: BIS Entity List
primaryAnchors.notes: US restricted-party anchor for export-control escalation questions. The app does not make screening determinations.

primaryAnchors.name: BIS Denied Persons List
primaryAnchors.notes: US denied-party anchor for export-control escalation questions. The app does not make screening determinations.

primaryAnchors.name: UN Security Council Consolidated List
primaryAnchors.notes: UN sanctions-list anchor for restricted-party escalation prompts.

primaryAnchors.name: EU Sanctions Map
primaryAnchors.notes: EU sanctions reference anchor for jurisdictional sanctions issue spotting.

primaryAnchors.name: Singapore Customs Strategic Goods Control
primaryAnchors.notes: Singapore-specific strategic goods control anchor for import/export evidence prompts.

primaryAnchors.name: UAE Executive Office for Control and Non-Proliferation
primaryAnchors.notes: UAE-specific strategic trade-control anchor for controlled-goods, end-use, licensing, and escalation prompts.

primaryAnchors.name: UAE Executive Office of Anti-Money Laundering and Counter Terrorism Financing
primaryAnchors.notes: UAE-specific AML/CFT and targeted-financial-sanctions anchor for sanctions and counterparty escalation prompts.

primaryAnchors.name: CourtListener REST API
primaryAnchors.notes: Citation verification and legal-reference import path. Live calls require token/configuration and remain advisory.

primaryAnchors.name: CUAD-compatible clause patterns
primaryAnchors.notes: Clause-type pattern anchor. Repo uses curated/synthetic clause fixtures unless an external dataset is provided.

primaryAnchors.name: SEC EDGAR APIs
primaryAnchors.notes: Public company filing and exhibit lookup anchor for contract/source verification when SEC context is relevant.

primaryAnchors.name: Free Law Project
primaryAnchors.notes: Public legal-data ecosystem anchor. Live ingestion requires explicit configuration and remains advisory.

primaryAnchors.name: Open Contracting Data Standard
primaryAnchors.notes: Procurement data model anchor for supplier, award, contract, milestone, and implementation evidence prompts.

primaryAnchors.name: World Bank Listing of Ineligible Firms and Individuals
primaryAnchors.notes: Debarment-reference anchor for supplier-risk escalation. Live checks require configured official data access.

primaryAnchors.name: SAM.gov Exclusions
primaryAnchors.notes: US exclusions-reference anchor for debarment and supplier-risk escalation. Live checks require configured official data access.

primaryAnchors.name: USAspending.gov
primaryAnchors.notes: US public spending data anchor for procurement context and supplier history prompts.

primaryAnchors.name: Tenders Electronic Daily
primaryAnchors.notes: EU public procurement notice anchor for sourcing and tender-history context.

primaryAnchors.name: UAE Ministry of Finance Procurement
primaryAnchors.notes: UAE federal finance/procurement anchor for local supplier and government-procurement context.

primaryAnchors.name: OSHA Laws and Regulations
primaryAnchors.notes: Occupational safety anchor for workplace and operational compliance prompts.

primaryAnchors.name: EPA ECHO
primaryAnchors.notes: Environmental compliance data anchor for supplier and facility prompts where US context is relevant.

primaryAnchors.name: Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive
primaryAnchors.notes: EU sustainability reporting anchor for ESG evidence and reporting prompts.

primaryAnchors.name: European Sustainability Reporting Standards
primaryAnchors.notes: EU ESRS anchor for sustainability disclosure evidence prompts.

primaryAnchors.name: UN Global Compact Ten Principles
primaryAnchors.notes: Human rights, labour, environment, and anti-corruption principles anchor for supplier due-diligence prompts.

primaryAnchors.name: IFRS Sustainability Standards
primaryAnchors.notes: ISSB/IFRS sustainability standards anchor for governance, climate, and sustainability disclosure prompts.

primaryAnchors.name: GRI Standards
primaryAnchors.notes: Sustainability reporting anchor for ESG topic and evidence prompts.

primaryAnchors.name: UAE Ministry of Climate Change and Environment
primaryAnchors.notes: UAE-specific environment and climate policy anchor for local ESG and operational compliance prompts.

primaryAnchors.name: UAE Ministry of Human Resources and Emiratisation
primaryAnchors.notes: UAE-specific labour and workplace-policy anchor for local workforce, safety, and employment-context prompts.

runtimeAnchors.name: Core42 Compass API documentation
runtimeAnchors.notes: Compass is recorded as the server-side LLM and embeddings runtime provider only. It is not a legal, compliance, security, procurement, sanctions, export-control, HSE, or ESG reference source.

safeClaims: Reference memory is advisory and public/synthetic.
Reference memory can improve questions, risk-domain detection, and control suggestions.
Deterministic policy and current evidence remain authoritative.
Raw embeddings and provider keys are not returned to browser/API callers.
unsafeClaims: Reference memory is live regulatory monitoring.
Reference memory makes sanctions, export-license, or compliance certification determinations.
